seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule.
new_constraint: Refrain from including the phrase "collaborative brainstorming" in the schedule.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. Include the phrase "collaborative brainstorming session" in the schedule. Refrain from including the phrase "collaborative brainstorming" in the schedule.
response:
# One-Week Sprint Schedule: New App Feature Development

**Team Roles:** 2 Frontend, 2 Backend, 1 QA Engineer, 1 Scrum Master/Project Lead
**Goal:** Complete core functionality for the new user dashboard feature.

### **Monday: Planning & Alignment**
*   **09:00 – 10:00**: Daily Stand-up (Sprint Kick-off)
*   **10:00 – 12:00**: **Collaborative Brainstorming Session** on edge cases and UI flow alternatives.
*   **13:00 – 15:00**: Requirement Finalization & Architecture Diagramming
*   **15:30 – 17:30**: Individual Task Breakdown (Jira/Ticket assignment)
*   **17:30 – 18:00**: End-of-Day Sync

### **Tuesday: Core Development**
*   **09:00 – 17:00**: Focused Coding Sprints (Frontend layout + Backend API endpoints)
*   **16:00 – 16:30**: Pair Programming Check-in (Cross-functional review of logic)
*   **17:00 – 18:00**: Git Commit Standards Review

### **Wednesday: Integration & Mid-Sprint Review**
*   **09:00 – 11:00**: Merge Requests Integration
*   **11:00 – 12:00**: Code Review Circle (Peer reviews for all active tickets)
*   **13:00 – 15:00**: Continued Development (Bug fixes from morning integration)
*   **15:00 – 16:00**: Progress Dashboard Update
*   **16:00 – 17:00**: Tech Debt Refactoring Window

### **Thursday: Testing Phase Begins**
*   **09:00 – 11:00**: Unit Test Writing (QA & Developers jointly)
*   **11:00 – 13:00**: Full System Integration Testing
*   **13:00 – 14:00**: Bug Triage Meeting (Prioritizing critical vs. minor issues)
*   **14:00 – 17:00**: Targeted Bug Fixes based on triage results

### **Friday: Testing Deep Dive & Deployment Prep**
*   **09:00 – 12:00**: User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Simulation
*   **12:00 – 13:00**: Performance Optimization Checks
*   **13:00 – 15:00**: Final Round of Team Meetings to address remaining blockers
*   **15:00 – 17:00**: Deployment Script Verification & Environment Staging
*   **17:00 – 18:00**: Weekly Wrap-up & Next Week Planning Preview

### **Saturday – Sunday:** Off<|im_end|>
final_answer:

**Team Roles:** 2 Frontend, 2 Backend, 1 QA Engineer, 1 Scrum Master/Project Lead
**Goal:** Complete core functionality for the new user dashboard feature.
